description_long: This is a cylindrical ceramic vase with a slightly flared rim and a muted, earthy glaze that gives it a rustic appearance. The surface is textured with a subtle crackle pattern, adding depth and character to the finish. Around the body of the vase, there are delicate hand-painted white cranes standing among fine brown reeds, evoking a tranquil, natural scene. The interior appears unglazed or minimally glazed, matching the exterior's subdued tone. The base is slightly recessed and unadorned, with a faint ring of exposed ceramic. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of traditional and minimalist aesthetics, suitable for understated urban decor.
description: A rustic, cylindrical ceramic vase with a crackle glaze and hand-painted white cranes among reeds. Its earthy tones and delicate artwork evoke a tranquil, natural feel.
description_view_0: The vase shows a mostly plain surface with a partial view of a white crane near the right edge.
description_view_1: This view highlights a single white crane standing in reeds, clearly visible on the vase's surface.
description_view_2: The crane motif is more central, with the bird's body and beak prominently displayed against the textured background.
description_view_3: Two white cranes are visible, one in full and another partially, with more of the reed pattern evident.
